query: Shein French appeals court ruling age verification adult products June 2026

{"query":"Shein French appeals court ruling age verification adult products June 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1557,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.dw.com/en/france-court-rejects-request-to-suspend-shein/a-75247011","title":"France court rejects request to suspend Shein","content":"A Paris court on Friday rejected the French government's request to suspend Chinese online platform Shein.
The government made the request for a three-month suspension after public outcry sparked by the presence on the platform of child-like sex dolls and other illicit items.
The court nonetheless ordered Shein to implement age-verification measures before resuming selling "sexual products that could constitute pornographic content."
The firm welcomed the ruling, saying it was committed to improving its control processes."},{"url":"https://www.lemonde.fr/en/france/article/2026/03/19/french-appeals-court-rejects-shein-suspension_6751615_7.html","title":"French appeals court rejects Shein suspension","content":"A French appeals court on Thursday, March 19, rejected the government's demand to temporarily suspend a section of Shein's website in France after the discovery that it was selling weapons, banned medications and childlike sex dolls.
Shein, which was founded in China and is now based in Singapore, sells ultra-cheap fashion clothing on its website and hosts a large number of third-party vendors."},{"url":"https://uk.finance.yahoo.com/news/paris-appeals-court-rejects-governments-093214054.html","title":"Paris appeals court rejects France's attempt to suspend Shein's marketplace","content":"A December court ​ruling had already rejected the government's request, but the government appealed.
The court upheld the earlier ruling that ​Shein ​may not sell such products on its marketplace again without ​adequate age-verification measures.
Since the findings in France, Shein no longer allows third-party sellers to list sex dolls in any of its markets, and is rolling out age-verification measures for other products, a Shein spokesperson said.
The company said it ​has maintained a "close dialogue" with French and European authorities, and is engaging with the ‌European Commission on age-verification measures "being gradually rolled out ​across a number of markets globally".
The ​European Union last month opened a formal investigation into Shein over illegal products and the platform's potentially addictive design, under the bloc's Digital Services Act."},{"url":"https://www.rfi.fr/en/france/20260319-appeal-court-blocks-france-s-bid-to-suspend-shein-over-illegal-products","title":"Appeal court blocks France’s bid to suspend Shein over illegal products - RFI","content":"The court ruled that the suspension was not justified because Shein had already removed the products from its platform.
However, it upheld a ban on Shein reselling lawful adult pornographic products without adding age-verification filters to its site, which the retailer has acknowledged are difficult to implement effectively.
A lower French court ruled in December that blocking Shein was "disproportionate" given the sale of the items in question had been "sporadic" and the site had since removed the listings."},{"url":"https://www.straitstimes.com/world/europe/french-court-orders-shein-to-verify-age-for-sex-toy-sales-or-risk-fines","title":"French court orders Shein to verify age for sex toy sales or risk fines | The Straits Times","content":"PARIS - A Paris court ordered Shein to implement age verification measures for any adult products sold via its French website on Dec 19 and set a €10,000 (S$15,000) fine for any ‍breach, after ​an uproar over childlike sex dolls sold on its marketplace.
The court on Dec 19 said Shein must implement measures to verify age – more than a simple declaration – that can prevent products of a pornographic nature being accessed by minors."}]}

Following the ruling, the government ‌said in a statement it will be \"extremely vigilant\" to see that Shein implements the conditions set by the court.
